# Pointer record (PTR)

*Internet standard*. A DNS record that maps an IP address to one hostname in a domain. It is also known as a reverse DNS record.

To configure [reverse DNS][rDNS] for your dedicated IP address in Twilio Email, add a [CNAME record][cname] to your DNS server.

## Related entries

* [Mail Exchanger record (MX)][mx]
* [Domain Name System (DNS)][dns]
* [Fully Qualified Domain Name][fqdn]
